title: How U Like Me Now
overview: Set on the south side of Chicago, How U Like Me Now? is a comedy that captures the lifestyles of several twenty-something African Americans. Centering on a slacker named Thomas and his ambitious girlfriend Valerie, the film follows the couple as they decide whether to continue their relationship or call it quits.
